questions.question: Ek naye beauty salon business ke liye sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Business plan banana

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi naye business ke liye sabse pehla aur zaroori step ek comprehensive Business Plan banana hota hai, jismein saare aspects cover hote hain.

questions.question: GST registration kis type ke businesses ke liye mandatory hai?

options.B: Jab annual turnover ek certain limit cross kare
options.C: Sirf product selling businesses ke liye
options.D: Sabhi salons ke liye, irrespective of turnover

questions.explanation: GST registration tab mandatory ho jaata hai jab business ka annual turnover ek prescribed limit (currently ₹20 lakh for services in most states) ko cross kar jaata hai.

questions.question: Sole Proprietorship business structure ka main fayda kya hai?

options.B: Easy to set up aur kam compliance
options.C: Capital raise karna aasan hota hai
options.D: Business ka separate legal entity hona

questions.explanation: Sole Proprietorship mein business ko set up karna aasan hota hai aur usmein compliance requirements bhi kam hoti hain.

questions.question: Salon business ke liye kaun sa insurance cover lena zaroori hai?

options.B: Professional Indemnity aur Public Liability Insurance

questions.explanation: Professional Indemnity galat services se hone wale nuksaan ko cover karta hai, aur Public Liability customers ko premises par hone wale accidents se bachata hai.

questions.question: Ek detailed business plan mein financial projections ka kya role hota hai?

options.B: Business ki future earnings aur expenses ka estimate dena

questions.explanation: Financial projections business ki future income, expenses, aur profitability ka estimate provide karte hain, jo decision making ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Shop and Establishment Act license kiske liye zaroori hai?

options.B: Har commercial establishment ke liye jahan employees kaam karte hain

questions.explanation: Shop and Establishment Act license har commercial establishment ke liye mandatory hai jo employees ko hire karta hai, jismein working hours aur conditions regulate ki jaati hain.

questions.question: Partnership firm mein partners ki liability kaisi hoti hai?

options.B: Unlimited liability

questions.explanation: Partnership firm mein partners ki liability unlimited hoti hai, jiska matlab hai ki business ke debts ke liye unki personal assets bhi use ho sakti hain.

questions.question: Ek salon ko FSSAI license ki zaroorat kab padti hai?

options.A: Agar woh hair services provide karta hai
options.B: Agar woh beauty products retail karta hai
options.C: Agar woh food ya beverages serve karta hai

questions.explanation: FSSAI license food related businesses ke liye hota hai. Agar salon apne clients ko food ya beverages serve karta hai, toh usko FSSAI license lena padega.

questions.question: Market research business plan ka ek crucial part kyun hai?

options.A: Competitors ko copy karne ke liye
options.B: Target audience aur market trends ko samajhne ke liye
options.C: Sirf prices decide karne ke liye
options.D: Interior design ke ideas lene ke liye

questions.explanation: Market research aapko apne target customers, unki needs, market trends, aur competitors ke baare mein valuable insights deta hai, jo business strategy banane mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Trademark registration kis liye zaroori hota hai?

options.A: Business ka address register karne ke liye
options.B: Apne brand name aur logo ko legal protection dene ke liye
options.C: Employees ki details register karne ke liye
options.D: Salon ke services list karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Trademark registration aapke brand name, logo, ya tagline ko legal protection deta hai, taki koi aur uska misuse na kar sake.

questions.question: Private Limited Company banane ka kya fayda hai over Sole Proprietorship?

options.B: Unlimited liability
options.C: Limited liability aur capital raise karna aasan

questions.explanation: Private Limited Company mein owners ki liability limited hoti hai aur capital raise karna bhi comparatively easy hota hai due to its corporate structure.

questions.question: Business plan mein Executive Summary ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Yeh plan ka sabse lamba section hota hai
options.B: Yeh poore business plan ka short overview deta hai
options.C: Ismein sirf financial details hoti hain
options.D: Yeh sirf marketing strategy ke liye hota hai

questions.explanation: Executive Summary poore business plan ka ek concise overview hota hai, jo readers ko business ke main points quickly samajhne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Salon ke liye fire safety regulations follow karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf electricity bill kam karne ke liye
options.B: Clients aur staff ki safety ensure karne aur legal non-compliance se bachne ke liye
options.D: Products ko store karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Fire safety regulations ko follow karna clients aur staff ki safety ke liye crucial hai, aur yeh legal requirement bhi hai.

questions.question: Local municipal corporation se kis type ke permits ki zaroorat pad sakti hai?

options.B: Trade license aur occupancy certificate

questions.explanation: Local municipal corporation se trade license (vyapar license) aur occupancy certificate (agar naya construction ya major renovation hai) ki zaroorat pad sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar aap salon ko franchise model par expand karna chahte hain, toh kaun se legal document ki zaroorat padegi?

options.B: Franchise Agreement

questions.explanation: Franchise model mein expansion ke liye Franchise Agreement ek zaroori legal document hai jo franchisor aur franchisee ke beech ke terms and conditions ko define karta hai.

questions.question: Business plan mein SWOT analysis ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats

questions.explanation: SWOT analysis business ki internal Strengths aur Weaknesses, aur external Opportunities aur Threats ko identify karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Salon ke liye music licensing (PPL/IPRS) kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Clients ko entertain karne ke liye
options.B: Background music publically play karne ke liye legal permission lene ke liye
options.C: Staff ko motivate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Public Performance License (PPL) aur Indian Performing Right Society (IPRS) license background music ko publically play karne ke liye legal permission dete hain, taaki copyright laws ka violation na ho.

questions.question: Ek salon ke liye location choose karte waqt sabse important factor kya hai?

options.B: High footfall aur target audience ki accessibility

questions.explanation: High footfall aur target audience ki easy accessibility salon ke business ke liye crucial hai, kyunki yeh client acquisition mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein hygiene aur sanitation maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf government rules follow karne ke liye
options.B: Clients aur staff ki safety aur trust maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Interior decoration ko achha dikhane ke liye
options.D: Product shelf life badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Hygiene aur sanitation maintain karna clients aur staff ki health aur safety ke liye paramount hai, aur yeh client trust build karne mein bhi help karta hai.

questions.question: Inventory management ka main goal kya hai salon mein?

options.B: Products ki wastage kam karna aur stock level optimize karna

questions.explanation: Inventory management ka goal products ki wastage ko minimize karna, stock-outs se bachna, aur capital ko efficiently use karna hai.

questions.question: Salon ke interior design mein lighting ka kya role hai?

options.B: Work areas mein proper visibility aur ambiance create karna

questions.explanation: Proper lighting work areas mein technicians ko accurate kaam karne mein help karti hai aur overall salon ke ambiance ko enhance karti hai.

questions.question: Appointment scheduling system ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Client flow ko manage karna aur wait times kam karna

questions.explanation: Appointment scheduling system se client flow organize hota hai, wait times kam hote hain, aur staff ki productivity bhi badhti hai.

questions.question: Salon mein cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Tools ko properly sterilize aur disinfect karna
options.D: Ek hi towel sabhi clients ke liye use karna

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye sabse important step hai tools ko har use ke baad properly sterilize aur disinfect karna.

questions.question: Salon ke service menu ko design karte waqt kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf competitors ki services copy karna
options.B: Target audience ki needs, pricing aur profitability

questions.explanation: Service menu design karte waqt target audience ki preferences, competitive pricing, aur har service ki profitability ko consider karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek salon ke waiting area ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Clients ko comfortable feel karwana aur unhe engage rakhna

questions.explanation: Waiting area clients ko comfortable environment provide karta hai aur unhe engage rakhta hai, jo overall experience ko enhance karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein water management practices kyun important hain?

options.A: Sirf water bill kam karne ke liye
options.B: Environmental sustainability aur cost saving ke liye
options.C: Staff ko extra kaam dene ke liye
options.D: Products ko store karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Efficient water management se na sirf water bill kam hota hai, balki yeh environmental responsibility aur sustainability ke liye bhi zaroori hai.

questions.question: Equipment procurement karte waqt durability aur maintenance ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Durability se koi farak nahi padta
options.B: Long-term cost savings aur operational efficiency ke liye

questions.explanation: Durable equipment aur easy maintenance long-term mein operational costs ko kam karte hain aur salon ki efficiency maintain rakhte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein waste disposal protocols ka kya role hai?

options.B: Infection control aur environmental compliance ensure karna

questions.explanation: Proper waste disposal protocols infection control ke liye critical hain, especially bio-hazardous waste ke liye, aur environmental regulations ko meet karna bhi zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek salon mein Music aur Aroma therapy ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Client experience ko enhance karna aur relaxing ambiance create karna

questions.explanation: Music aur Aroma therapy clients ke liye ek relaxing aur pleasant ambiance create karte hain, jo unke overall salon experience ko improve karta hai.

questions.question: Salon ke reception area mein kaun si cheez sabse important hai?

options.B: Friendly aur efficient staff

questions.explanation: Reception area salon ka first impression hota hai, aur ek friendly aur efficient staff clients ko welcome karne aur unki queries handle karne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Salon mein electrical safety measures kyun zaroori hain?

options.A: Sirf electricity bill kam karne ke liye
options.B: Accidents, short circuits aur fire hazards se bachne ke liye
options.C: Equipment ko kharab karne ke liye
options.D: Staff ko extra kaam dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Electrical safety measures accidents, short circuits, aur fire hazards ko prevent karne ke liye essential hain, jo clients aur staff ki safety ensure karte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein retail products display karte waqt kya strategy honi chahiye?

options.B: Attractive display, proper labeling aur staff recommendations
options.D: Clients ko force karna purchase karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Attractive display, clear labeling, aur knowledgeable staff recommendations retail product sales ko boost karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Salon operations mein Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Consistency, quality control aur staff training ke liye guidelines provide karna

questions.explanation: SOPs har service aur task ke liye step-by-step guidelines provide karte hain, jo consistency, quality control, aur efficient staff training ensure karte hain.

questions.question: Salon ke premises mein proper ventilation kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf AC ka bill kam karne ke liye
options.B: Chemical fumes aur unpleasant odors ko remove karne aur fresh air circulation ke liye
options.C: Clients ko thand lagane ke liye
options.D: Products ko dry rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation chemical fumes aur unpleasant odors ko remove karne ke liye essential hai, aur yeh fresh air circulation se healthy environment maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Salon ke liye Digital Marketing ka sabse bada fayda kya hai?

options.B: Wider reach, targeted advertising aur measurable results
options.C: Only local newspaper mein ad dena

questions.explanation: Digital marketing se aap bade audience tak pahunch sakte hain, specific groups ko target kar sakte hain, aur apni campaigns ki effectiveness ko measure kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Social Media Marketing salon ke liye kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf photos post karne ke liye
options.B: Brand visibility badhane, client engagement aur new clients attract karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Social media platforms salon ko apni services showcase karne, clients ke saath engage karne, aur naye clients ko attract karne ka ek powerful medium provide karte hain.

questions.question: Client Loyalty Programs ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Existing clients ko retain karna aur unhe repeat business ke liye encourage karna

questions.explanation: Loyalty programs existing clients ko appreciate karte hain aur unhe regular visits ke liye incentivize karte hain, jo long-term client retention ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Salon ki branding mein logo ka kya role hai?

options.B: Brand ki identity aur recognition create karna

questions.explanation: Ek achha logo brand ki identity ko represent karta hai aur clients ke mind mein instant recognition create karta hai.

questions.question: Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Client data manage karna, personalized services offer karna aur communication improve karna

questions.explanation: CRM system clients ki details, preferences, aur service history ko track karta hai, jisse personalized services aur effective communication possible ho paati hai.

questions.question: Word-of-Mouth marketing salon ke liye kyun powerful hai?

options.B: Trust aur credibility build karta hai through personal recommendations
options.C: Sirf online reviews tak limited hai
options.D: Ismein advertising ki zaroorat nahi padti

questions.explanation: Word-of-Mouth marketing sabse trustworthy hota hai kyunki log apne friends aur family ki recommendations par zyada bharosa karte hain.

questions.question: Upselling aur Cross-selling ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Clients ko extra products force karna
options.B: Existing service ko upgrade karna (upsell) aur related services/products offer karna (cross-sell)

questions.explanation: Upselling mein client ko higher-value service offer ki jaati hai, jabki cross-selling mein related products ya services suggest ki jaati hain.

questions.question: Salon ke liye local SEO (Search Engine Optimization) kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf website traffic badhane ke liye
options.B: Local searches mein salon ki visibility badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Local SEO aapke salon ko Google Maps aur local search results mein top par lane mein help karta hai, jab log 'salon near me' search karte hain.

questions.question: Client feedback collect karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Services improve karna aur client satisfaction measure karna

questions.explanation: Client feedback aapko apni services ki quality samajhne aur unhe improve karne ka mauka deta hai, jo client satisfaction ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Email Marketing salon ke liye kaise faydemand ho sakta hai?

options.B: Promotions, new services aur personalized offers clients tak pahunchana

questions.explanation: Email marketing ek direct aur cost-effective way hai clients ko engage rakhne, unhe updates dene, aur special offers ke baare mein inform karne ka.

questions.question: Salon ke liye ek strong online presence banane ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Professional website, active social media aur online reviews management

questions.explanation: Ek professional website, regular social media activity, aur positive online reviews ka effective management ek strong online presence ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Public Relations (PR) salon ke liye kaise kaam karta hai?

options.B: Positive public image banana aur media coverage obtain karna

questions.explanation: PR salon ki reputation ko build karta hai aur media ke through positive publicity generate karta hai, jo brand image ke liye beneficial hai.

questions.question: Seasonal promotions aur festive offers ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Sales boost karna aur naye clients attract karna

questions.explanation: Seasonal promotions aur festive offers clients ko attract karte hain aur specific periods mein sales volume ko significantly boost karte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein customer service ka sabse important aspect kya hai?

options.B: Clients ko attentive, respectful aur personalized experience dena

questions.explanation: Excellent customer service clients ko valued feel karwati hai, jo unki loyalty aur repeat visits ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Google My Business listing salon ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Local search results mein appear hona, reviews manage karna aur business info display karna

questions.explanation: Google My Business listing local visibility ke liye critical hai, jahan clients aapke salon ka address, phone, business hours, aur reviews dekh sakte hain.

questions.question: Event Marketing mein salon kaise participate kar sakta hai?

options.B: Local fairs mein stalls lagana, fashion shows mein partnership karna ya workshops conduct karna

questions.explanation: Event marketing se salon naye clients se direct connect kar sakta hai, apni services showcase kar sakta hai, aur brand awareness badha sakta hai.

questions.question: SMS Marketing ka kya fayda hai salon ke context mein?

options.B: Appointment reminders, special offers aur updates directly clients tak pahunchana with high open rates

questions.explanation: SMS marketing mein high open rates hote hain, jo appointment reminders, last-minute offers, aur urgent updates ke liye bahut effective hai.

questions.question: Salon ke liye Budgeting ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Financial resources ko plan aur allocate karna

questions.explanation: Budgeting aapko apni income aur expenses ko plan karne mein help karta hai, taaki aap apne financial goals achieve kar saken.

questions.question: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) mein kya include hota hai salon ke context mein?

options.B: Services provide karne mein directly use hone wale products ki cost

questions.explanation: COGS mein woh products ki cost include hoti hai jo directly client services mein use hote hain, jaise hair color, wax, facial kits.

questions.question: Salon mein pricing strategy decide karte waqt kya consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Operating costs, market demand, competitor pricing aur perceived value

questions.explanation: Pricing strategy banate waqt saare costs, market research, competitor analysis, aur client ki perception ko dhyaan mein rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Profit and Loss (P&L) Statement ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf bank loan lene ke liye
options.B: Ek specific period mein business ki profitability show karna

questions.explanation: P&L statement business ki income aur expenses ko list karta hai, jisse uski profitability (net profit ya loss) pata chalti hai.

questions.question: Cash Flow Statement ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Business mein cash ke inflows aur outflows ko track karna

questions.explanation: Cash Flow Statement business ki liquidity ko show karta hai, yani kitna cash andar aa raha hai aur kitna bahar ja raha hai, jo daily operations ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Break-Even Point ka kya matlab hai salon ke business mein?

options.A: Jab salon ko bahut zyada profit ho
options.B: Woh point jahan total revenue total costs ke barabar ho, na profit na loss
options.D: Jab staff ki salary double ho

questions.explanation: Break-Even Point woh stage hai jahan business ne itni sales kar li hain ki usne saare fixed aur variable costs cover kar liye hain, aur ab usko profit ya loss nahi ho raha.

questions.question: Variable costs ke examples kya hain salon mein?

options.B: Products used per service, staff commission aur utility bills (depending on usage)

questions.explanation: Variable costs woh hain jo business activity ke level ke saath fluctuate karte hain, jaise har service mein use hone wale products, ya performance-based staff commission.

questions.question: Salon mein taxation ke liye kaun se taxes applicable ho sakte hain?

options.B: Income Tax, GST aur Professional Tax (agar applicable ho)

questions.explanation: Salon business par Income Tax, Goods and Services Tax (GST) agar turnover limit cross kare, aur kuch states mein Professional Tax bhi applicable ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Online Payment Gateways ka kya fayda hai salon ke liye?

options.B: Convenience, faster transactions aur cashless options provide karna

questions.explanation: Online payment gateways clients ko multiple payment options dete hain, transactions ko fast karte hain, aur business ke liye accounting ko simplify karte hain.

questions.question: Salon ke financial health ko monitor karne ke liye kaun sa tool best hai?

options.B: Accounting software (jaise Tally, QuickBooks)

questions.explanation: Accounting software financial transactions ko efficiently track karta hai, reports generate karta hai, aur overall financial health monitor karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein Discounts aur Offers dene ki kya strategy honi chahiye?

options.B: Specific goals ke saath (e.g., new client acquisition, off-peak hours fill karna) aur profitability ko dhyaan mein rakhkar

questions.explanation: Discounts ko strategically use karna chahiye taaki woh sales boost karein lekin business ki profitability par negative impact na daalein. Clear goals hone chahiye.

questions.question: Working Capital ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf machine purchase karne ke liye paise
options.B: Short-term assets minus short-term liabilities, daily operations ke liye available funds

questions.explanation: Working Capital woh funds hain jo business ki daily operations aur short-term obligations ko meet karne ke liye available hote hain.

questions.question: Salon mein pricing method 'Cost-Plus Pricing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf competitors ki prices copy karna
options.B: Service ki cost mein ek certain profit margin add karna

questions.explanation: Cost-Plus Pricing mein aap service provide karne ki total cost calculate karte hain aur usmein ek desired profit margin add kar dete hain.

questions.question: Salon ke financial records ko kitne time tak maintain karna chahiye?

options.B: Income Tax Act ke according minimum 6 se 8 saal tak
options.C: Jab tak business chal raha ho

questions.explanation: Income Tax Act ke according, financial records ko minimum 6 se 8 saal tak maintain karna mandatory hai for audit and compliance purposes.

questions.question: Revenue Management ka kya matlab hai salon mein?

options.B: Pricing aur inventory ko optimize karna taaki maximum revenue generate ho

questions.explanation: Revenue management mein dynamic pricing, capacity utilization, aur service bundling jaise strategies use ki jaati hain taaki salon apni services se maximum revenue extract kar sake.

questions.question: Salon mein Petty Cash ka kya use hai?

options.B: Small, day-to-day expenses ke liye cash reserve

questions.explanation: Petty cash chote-mote expenses jaise office supplies, cleaning items, ya emergency purchases ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Salon ke financial statements mein 'Assets' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Jo bhi business own karta hai aur future economic value provide karta hai

questions.explanation: Assets woh resources hain jo business own karta hai aur jinse future mein economic benefit milne ki expectation hoti hai, jaise equipment, inventory, cash, building.

questions.question: Salon mein staff recruitment karte waqt sabse important factor kya hai?

options.B: Skills, experience, attitude aur client handling ability
options.D: Sabse kam salary par kaam karne wala

questions.explanation: Right candidate ko choose karne ke liye skills aur experience ke saath-saath unka attitude, client handling, aur team work ability bhi dekhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Staff training programs ka kya fayda hai salon ke liye?

options.B: Skills enhance karna, service quality improve karna aur staff retention badhana

questions.explanation: Regular training se staff ki skills updated rehti hain, service quality improve hoti hai, aur staff bhi valued feel karte hain, jisse retention badhti hai.

questions.question: Performance appraisal ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Staff ki performance evaluate karna, feedback dena aur growth opportunities identify karna

questions.explanation: Performance appraisal staff ko unki strengths aur weaknesses ke baare mein feedback deta hai, aur unki professional development ke liye goals set karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein team building activities kyun zaroori hain?

options.B: Collaboration improve karna, communication badhana aur positive work environment create karna

questions.explanation: Team building activities staff ke beech understanding aur cooperation badhati hain, jisse ek positive aur productive work environment banta hai.

questions.question: Employee Handbook mein kya information honi chahiye?

options.B: Company policies, procedures, code of conduct aur employee benefits

questions.explanation: Employee Handbook naye employees ko company ke rules, expectations, aur culture ke baare mein inform karta hai, aur existing employees ke liye reference ka kaam karta hai.

questions.question: Incentive schemes staff ke liye kaise faydemand ho sakti hain?

options.B: Motivation badhana, productivity improve karna aur sales boost karna

questions.explanation: Incentive schemes staff ko specific goals achieve karne ke liye motivate karti hain, jisse unki productivity aur overall salon ki sales badhti hain.

questions.question: Salon mein conflict resolution ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Healthy work environment maintain karna aur misunderstandings resolve karna

questions.explanation: Effective conflict resolution workplace mein positive atmosphere maintain karta hai aur staff ke beech trust aur respect ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Staff retention ke liye kaun si strategy sabse effective hai?

options.B: Fair compensation, growth opportunities, positive work culture aur recognition

questions.explanation: Staff retention ke liye sirf salary nahi, balki ek holistic approach zaroori hai jismein career growth, work-life balance, aur appreciation bhi shaamil ho.

questions.question: Salon mein job descriptions ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Employee ki roles, responsibilities aur expectations clear karna

questions.explanation: Job descriptions employees ko unki exact responsibilities aur expectations ke baare mein clear picture deti hain, jo performance management ke liye bhi helpful hai.

questions.question: Salon mein health aur safety policies kyun zaroori hain?

options.A: Sirf government se bachne ke liye
options.B: Staff aur clients ki well-being ensure karna aur accidents ko prevent karna

questions.explanation: Health aur safety policies workplace mein risks ko minimize karti hain aur sabhi ke liye ek safe environment provide karti hain.

questions.question: Salon mein 'On-the-Job Training' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Practical skills real-time mein develop karna aur immediate applicability

questions.explanation: On-the-Job Training employees ko actual work environment mein skills seekhne ka mauka deta hai, jisse woh jaldi proficient ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Staff meetings kyun conduct ki jaati hain?

options.B: Communication improve karna, updates dena aur team ko align karna

questions.explanation: Staff meetings team ko important updates dene, feedback collect karne, aur sabhi ko common goals par align karne ka ek effective platform hain.

questions.question: Salon mein absenteeism aur tardiness ko kaise manage karna chahiye?

options.B: Clear policies set karna, communicate karna aur consistent action lena

questions.explanation: Absenteeism aur tardiness ko manage karne ke liye clear policies, proper communication, aur consistent enforcement zaroori hai.

questions.question: Employee Recognition Programs ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Staff morale badhana, motivation enhance karna aur positive work culture create karna

questions.explanation: Recognition programs employees ko valued feel karwate hain, unki hard work ko acknowledge karte hain, aur overall morale ko boost karte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein succession planning kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf naye employees ko hire karna
options.B: Key positions ke liye future leaders develop karna aur business continuity ensure karna

questions.explanation: Succession planning business ki long-term stability ke liye crucial hai, kyunki yeh ensure karta hai ki critical roles ke liye qualified candidates available hon.

questions.question: Staff schedule banate waqt kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Client demand, staff availability, skill sets aur labor laws

questions.explanation: Effective staff scheduling client demand ko meet karta hai, staff ki workload balance karta hai, aur labor laws ko comply karta hai.

questions.question: Market research entrepreneur ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: New opportunities identify karna, risks assess karna aur informed decisions lena

questions.explanation: Market research entrepreneur ko market trends, customer needs, aur competition ke baare mein critical insights deta hai, jo strategic decision making ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Competitor analysis ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Competitors ki strengths aur weaknesses ko samajhna aur apni competitive advantage build karna

questions.explanation: Competitor analysis aapko market mein apni position samajhne mein help karta hai aur apni unique selling propositions (USPs) ko develop karne mein guide karta hai.

questions.question: Salon business mein innovation ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: New services introduce karna, existing processes improve karna ya technology adopt karna
options.D: Clients ko force karna naye services lene ke liye

questions.explanation: Innovation business ko dynamic rakhta hai, client interest maintain karta hai, aur market mein competitive edge provide karta hai.

questions.question: Franchising salon business ke liye ek growth strategy kaise hai?

options.B: Brand ko multiple locations par expand karna without direct investment

questions.explanation: Franchising se aap apna brand aur business model dusre entrepreneurs ko license dekar expand kar sakte hain, jisse capital investment kam lagta hai.

questions.question: Risk Management ka kya importance hai entrepreneurship mein?

options.B: Potential risks ko identify, assess aur mitigate karna
options.C: Sab kuch luck par chhod dena

questions.explanation: Risk management business ko unexpected challenges se bachata hai aur stability maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Brand building salon ke liye kyun crucial hai?

options.B: Client loyalty create karna, market recognition badhana aur competitive differentiation

questions.explanation: Ek strong brand clients ke mind mein trust aur value create karta hai, jisse woh aapke salon ko prefer karte hain.

questions.question: Diversification strategy ka kya matlab hai salon business mein?

options.A: Sirf ek service par focus karna
options.B: New services ya products add karna to expand revenue streams

questions.explanation: Diversification se business ki revenue streams badhti hain aur woh market fluctuations ke against zyada resilient banta hai.

questions.question: Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Sirf ek baar ki purchase value
options.B: Ek customer se expected total revenue over their relationship with the salon

questions.explanation: CLV aapko batata hai ki ek customer long-term mein aapke business ke liye kitna valuable hai, jisse aap retention strategies par focus kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Joint Venture (JV) salon business ke liye kaise faydemand ho sakta hai?

options.B: Resources aur expertise share karke naye markets enter karna ya bade projects undertake karna

questions.explanation: JV do ya do se zyada businesses ko collaborate karne ka mauka deta hai, jisse woh resources pool kar sakte hain aur mutual benefits achieve kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Exit Strategy ka kya matlab hai entrepreneurship mein?

options.B: Business se owner ki planned departure, jaise selling, merging ya passing on

questions.explanation: Exit strategy owner ko business se smoothly nikalne ka plan provide karta hai, jisse unki investment ka return maximize ho sake.

questions.question: Entrepreneurship mein continuous learning kyun important hai?

options.B: Market trends ke saath updated rehna, skills improve karna aur adaptability maintain karna

questions.explanation: Continuous learning entrepreneur ko dynamic market mein relevant rehne aur apne business ko grow karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Mentorship ka kya role hai naye entrepreneurs ke liye?

options.B: Guidance, experience sharing aur networking opportunities provide karna

questions.explanation: Mentors naye entrepreneurs ko apni experience se guide karte hain, challenges overcome karne mein help karte hain, aur valuable connections provide karte hain.

questions.question: Salon ke liye online booking system ka kya fayda hai growth perspective se?

options.A: Sirf staff ko kaam kam dena
options.B: Client convenience badhana, 24/7 bookings enable karna aur efficiency improve karna

questions.explanation: Online booking system clients ko flexibility deta hai aur salon ke operational hours ke bahar bhi bookings allow karta hai, jisse business growth hoti hai.

questions.question: Salon business mein CSR (Corporate Social Responsibility) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Environmental aur social well-being mein contribute karna

questions.explanation: CSR business ko society aur environment ke prati apni responsibility nibhane ke liye encourage karta hai, jo brand image aur customer loyalty ko boost karta hai.

questions.question: Business expansion ke liye sabse pehle kya assess karna chahiye?

options.B: Market potential, financial capacity aur operational readiness

questions.explanation: Expansion se pehle market research, financial analysis, aur existing operations ki scalability ko thoroughly assess karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Entrepreneurship mein 'Adaptability' ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Sirf ek plan par stick rehna
options.B: Market changes, customer demands aur new technologies ke according business ko adjust karna

questions.explanation: Dynamic business environment mein successful hone ke liye adaptability crucial hai, kyunki yeh business ko relevant aur competitive rakhti hai.
